discreteTopology_of_open_singleton_one <| by
    obtain ⟨U, h1U, hU⟩ := exists_open_around_one_without_subgroup (G := Circle)
      (le_antisymm Subgroup.order_le_one_of_le_unit_circle_around_one_group bot_le)
    rw [continuousMonoidHom_topology_eq_compact_open,
      (compact_open_basis_compact_nhds 1).mem_nhds_iff]
    refine ⟨(Set.univ, U), ⟨isCompact_univ, h1U⟩, fun f hf ↦ ?_⟩
    ext x
    exact Subgroup.mem_bot.mp (hU (Submonoid.toSubgroup f.range
      (Submonoid.isGroup_of_isCompact (isCompact_range f.continuous)))
      (Set.image_subset_iff.mpr hf) ▸ Set.mem_range_self x)

discreteTopology_one_open <| by
    have h1 : {(1 : PontryaginDual M)} = (fun f : PontryaginDual M ↦ (f : ContinuousMap M Circle)) ⁻¹' (ContinuousMap.gen Set.univ {z : Circle | 0 < z.re}) := by
      ext f; constructor
      · rintro rfl x; exact zero_lt_one
      · intro hf; ext x; exact Circle.eq_one_of_pow_re_nonneg fun n ↦ (hf (x ^ n)).le
    rw [h1]
    exact (ContinuousMap.isOpen_gen isCompact_univ (isOpen_lt continuous_const Circle.continuous_re)).preimage continuous_induced_dom

by
  apply discreteTopology_iff_isOpen_singleton_one.mpr
  let U := {z : Circle | 0 < (z : ℂ).re}
  have hU : IsOpen U := (isOpen_Ioi 0).preimage (continuous_re.comp continuous_subtype_val)
  have : IsOpen {f : PontryaginDual M | ∀ x, f x ∈ U} :=
    continuous_induced_dom.isOpen_preimage (·.toContinuousMap)
      (ContinuousMap.isOpen_setOf_maps_subset isCompact_univ hU)
  convert this
  ext f
  simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  constructor
  · rintro rfl x; simp
  · intro hf
    ext x
    let H := Subgroup.closure {f x}
    have : H = ⊥ := Circle.subgroup_eq_bot_of_re_pos H (by
      intro z hz
      obtain ⟨n, rfl⟩ := Subgroup.mem_closure_singleton.mp hz
      cases n with
      | ofNat n => rw [map_pow f]; exact hf (x ^ n)
      | negSucc n => rw [zpow_neg, zpow_natCast, Circle.re_inv, map_pow f]; exact hf (x ^ (n + 1)))
    simpa [this] using Subgroup.subset_closure (Set.mem_singleton (f x))

  exact Subgroup.ext_iff.mp this (f x) ⟨x, rfl⟩

by
  rw [discreteTopology_iff_isOpen_singleton_one]
  obtain ⟨U, h1U, hU, hU'⟩ := mem_nhds_iff.mp Circle.exists_nhds_one_isTrivial_subgroup
  convert continuous_induced_dom.isOpen_preimage (ContinuousMap.isOpen_set_of_maps_subset isCompact_univ hU) using 1
  ext f
  simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.image_univ, ContinuousMonoidHom.one_apply]
  refine ⟨fun hf ↦ ?_, fun rfl ↦ by simpa [h1U]⟩
  ext x
  let S : Subgroup Circle := { MonoidHom.range f with
    inv_mem' := fun hx ↦ IsCompact.mem_inv_of_mem_submonoid (isCompact_range f.continuous) hx }
  exact (Subgroup.ext_iff.mp (hU' S hf) (f x)).mp ⟨x, rfl⟩

simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_singleton_iff, ContinuousMonoidHom.ext_iff,
      ContinuousMonoidHom.one_apply]
    exact ⟨fun hx ↦ ContinuousMonoidHom.ext fun x ↦ Complex.Circle.eq_one_of_pow_re_nonneg fun n ↦
      (hx (x ^ n)).le, fun hf x ↦ hf.symm ▸ zero_lt_one⟩

discreteTopology_iff_isOpen_singleton_one.mpr <|
    let ⟨_V, hV, h⟩ := NoSmallSubgroups.exists_nhds_one_subgroup_eq_bot (G := Circle)
    let ⟨U, hUV, hU, hU1⟩ := mem_nhds_iff.mp hV
    isOpen_induced.mpr ⟨ContinuousMap.isOpen_gen_univ hU, Set.ext fun f ↦
      ⟨fun hf ↦ ContinuousMonoidHom.ext fun x ↦
        Subgroup.mem_bot.mp <| (h (f.mrange.toSubgroup fun _ ↦
          Submonoid.mem_inv_of_isCompact (isCompact_range f.continuous_toFun) _)
          (Set.range_subset_iff.mpr fun x ↦ hUV (hf x))) ▸ f.mem_mrange x,
       fun hf x ↦ hf.symm ▸ hU1⟩⟩
